title: Assistant Store Manager - ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!
